title: Ononis hesperia
intro: Ononis hesperia, also known as the Eastern jointed goat's-thorn, is a perennial plant species within the Fabaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antidiabetic properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and diabetes. The bioactive constituents of Ononis hesperia include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made from Ononis hesperia include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
